topics.name: Solar System
learning_objectives: Name the eight planets in order from the Sun
Explain the difference between rotation and revolution
Describe phases of the moon
Identify the positions and features of inner and outer planets

topics.name: Human Body Systems
learning_objectives: Describe the digestive system and its organs
Explain the respiratory system and gas exchange
Describe the circulatory system and the heart's function
Identify the major bones and muscles

topics.name: Rocks and Soil
learning_objectives: Classify rocks as igneous, sedimentary and metamorphic
Describe the formation of each rock type
Identify layers of soil: topsoil, subsoil, bedrock
Explain soil erosion and conservation

topics.name: Natural Disasters
learning_objectives: Name and describe major natural disasters
Explain causes and effects of earthquakes, floods and cyclones
Describe disaster management and safety measures
Locate disaster-prone areas on a map of India

topics.name: India – History and Heritage
learning_objectives: Describe major periods of Indian history (ancient, medieval, modern)
Name key freedom fighters and their contributions
Explain the importance of the Indian Constitution
Identify UNESCO World Heritage Sites in India
worksheet_types: fill in the blanks on Constitution

topics.name: Environment – Conservation and Biodiversity
learning_objectives: Define biodiversity and explain its importance
Name endangered species in India
Explain deforestation and its consequences
Describe methods of wildlife and environmental conservation
